rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 04, 2016, line 7. DEFENDANTS MARIE RIOS and 445 O'FARRELL STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-15-545140, CGC-15-546488, CGC-15-547336, CGC-15-547421, CGC-15-548937 WITH CASE CGC-15-544094 DENIED. rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, March 04, 2016, line 9. DEFENDANT NATALIE MARDEUSZ AMENDED DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT overruled. Complaint alleges a relationship supporting a cause of action for unlawful detainer under CCP 1161(1). Receiver was authorized to hire counsel by July 22, 2015 order and satisfied his obligations under CCP 567(a). = (501/RAW)
